data.body:
Parent knot tracking the initiative to make foolery's All Repositories Mode performant and responsive at scale.

Current bottlenecks:
1. `beats-multi-repo.ts` uses Promise.all() across all registered repos — UI blocks until the slowest repo responds
2. `kno ls` loads the entire hot table into memory with no SQL-level pagination — full dataset transfer every time
3. No streaming output from kno CLI — large JSON payloads arrive atomically
4. No progressive loading UX — user sees empty screen then sudden data dump

The fix spans both foolery (client/server) and knots (CLI/backend):
- Foolery server: stream per-repo results as each backend responds instead of awaiting all
- Foolery client: progressive hydration with per-repo loading feedback and smooth data insertion
- Knots CLI: paginated queries (LIMIT/OFFSET in SQL, --limit/--offset flags) and NDJSON streaming output

Child knots in both foolery and knots repos track the specific implementation work.
data.title: Scale All Repositories Mode with progressive loading and streaming
